keys: # Embervale string catalogue (Phase 24G). First column is the stable key; one column per locale.
# Author UI/dialogue strings here and reference them via Loc.T("key") — no hard-coded player strings.
# Add a new locale by adding a column (e.g. "fr") and translating each row.

en: Choose whether to save creation — or become its next Ash King.
Nothing discovered yet — explore to fill the map.
Nothing here can be salvaged at this station.
A line about who you are
Goblins harry the roads out of the Ember Crown. The guild posts a standing bounty: thin their numbers in the wilds.
Bryn's forge runs cold without ore. Bring iron from the northern hills so the smith can arm the town.
Mirela's stores run thin while goblin wounds mount. Gather healing herb from the wilds for the apothecary.
The goblins answer to a warband massing in the northern wilds. The elder asks you to break its back before it falls on the town.
The notice board bristles with contracts. One fresh bounty catches your eye.
BOUNTY: Goblins prey on our roads. Cull three in the wilds and the guild pays in coin. Take the contract?
The contract is yours. Goblins haunt the wilds beyond the walls — go earn your coin.
The bounty still stands: three goblins, not yet culled.
The bounty is settled — the guild thanks you. Watch the board for more.
Bryn looks up from a cold anvil, soot dark on his brow.
The forge — is it burning again?
My forge is dead without ore. Bring me three lumps of iron from the hills and I'll keep the town in steel. Will you?
Bless you. The hills lie to the north — mind the goblins along the way.
Still cold, this forge. Three lumps of iron ore — that's all I ask.
The iron you brought has the forge roaring again. Steel for the town at last — my thanks.
Mirela grinds herbs with a worried frown, her shelves near bare.
Goblin wounds fill my cot and my remedies run dry. Four sprigs of healing herb from the wilds would save lives. Will you gather them?
Thank you. The herb grows in the wilds — look for the pale green leaves.
My shelves are still bare. Four sprigs of healing herb, when you can.
With these herbs the wounded will mend. You've done more than you know — thank you.
These raids are no accident. A warband masses in the northern wilds, and its captain means to burn us out. Cut down five of them and you break its nerve. Will you stand for the Ember Crown?
Then the Flame go with you. Strike at the heart of them in the northern wilds.
The warband still gathers. Five of them, traveller — break their nerve.
You broke the warband. The Ember Crown will sing your name by the hearth tonight — take the smith's finest steel, you have more than earned it.
